articles.title: Achilles healed: Celtics OK Tatum for Fri. return
articles.original_title: Achilles healed: Celtics OK Tatum for Fri. return
articles.summary: Jayson Tatum is officially available for the Celtics' Friday night home game against the Mavericks. Tatum suffered a torn right Achilles tendon in the playoffs less than 10 months ago.

articles.title: Celtics star Jayson Tatum's status upgraded to available, clearing way for season debut vs. Dallas
articles.original_title: Celtics star Jayson Tatum's status upgraded to available, clearing way for season debut vs. Dallas
articles.summary: Boston Celtics star Jayson Tatum’s status has been upgraded to available, clearing the way for him to make his season debut almost 10 months after having surgery to repair a ruptured right Achilles tendon.  Tatum’s status was updated Friday afternoon ahead of the Celtics’ home matchup with the Dallas Mavericks.  Tatum was listed as questionable for the game Thursday.

articles.title: North Carolina star Caleb Wilson breaks right thumb in practice and is out for the season
articles.original_title: North Carolina star Caleb Wilson breaks right thumb in practice and is out for the season
articles.summary: Caleb Wilson appeared close to returning for No. 17 North Carolina from a fracture to his left hand, just in time for the peak of March.  The school announced Friday that Wilson will need surgery after breaking his right thumb in a non-contact drill suffered during Thursday's practice.  It was a shocking change to Wilson's trajectory as the Tar Heels' scoring and rebounding leader inched his way back from the injury suffered in a Feb. 10 loss at Miami.

articles.title: Fired Michigan football coach Sherrone Moore reaches plea deal to resolve home invasion case
articles.original_title: Fired Michigan football coach Sherrone Moore reaches plea deal to resolve home invasion case
articles.summary: Former Michigan football coach Sherrone Moore pleaded no contest Friday to two misdemeanors in a criminal case that arose immediately after he was fired for having an inappropriate relationship with his executive assistant.  The deal was struck on the same day that a judge planned to hear a challenge to Moore’s arrest in December on three charges, including felony home invasion.  “Things have changed,” Judge J. Cedric Simpson said.

articles.title: Messi has long steered clear of politics. Does his visit to Trump's White House mark a change?
articles.original_title: Messi has long steered clear of politics. Does his visit to Trump's White House mark a change?
articles.summary: Assisted by a glittering, pink soccer ball, Lionel Messi crossed yet another frontier with his visit to the White House.  Until Thursday, the global soccer superstar had been equally adept at dodging defenders on the field and political leaders, especially those in his own country of Argentina.  There were questions about whether he would even appear with the rest of Inter Miami to celebrate their MLS Cup win at the White House.
